title: Beetiful Garden
body:
A mod which adds various effect Beetroots to the game

Inspired by Karat Garden but for 1.16.5-1.21.1

Craft a Beetiful Seed and grow it on a variety of blocks to get started!

![Grows on blocks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Wxrlds/BeetifulGarden/refs/heads/1.21.1-neoforge/ModPageScreenshot1.png)

Eating a Beetiful will give you a potion effect depending on which type of Beetiful you eat.

Adds the "Beetzza", an item that cures you from the Wither effect.

# Configurability
You can configure every aspect of the mod:
- Which block the Beetiful grows on
- Which effects you get for eating a Beetiful
- Nutrition and Saturation for the individual Beetifuls
- Which effects the Beetzza cures

# Mod Support

- [Botany Pots](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots)
- [Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)

[Need a server? Just click on the Picture, use the code Wxrlds for 25% off of your first month and play with your friends!](https://bisecthosting.com/Wxrlds?r=BeetifulGarden+Modrinth)
